properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's not a mountain too tall There's not a problem so small That Jesus can't resolve In time He'll get involved Our God He cares about us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So wait on the Lord Wait on the Lord Wait on the Lord And He'll renew your strength

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's not a night too dark A journey too long to embark Jesus will see you through In time He'll make you new Our God He cares about us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So wait on the Lord Wait on the Lord Wait on the Lord And He'll renew your strength

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Cause He's ordering, He's ordering your strength You've got to wait, you've got to wait

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am not turning back now Am not turning back now Am not turning back now Am not turning back now

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am gonna wait on You Jesus Am not turning back now Am not turning back now Am not turning back now Am not turning back now
